headline: NVIDIA Crosses $5 Trillion Market Cap as AI Chip Demand Surges
summary: NVIDIA hit a $5 trillion market cap on April 24, surging 4.3% to $208.27. The data center segment generated $62.3B in Q4 FY2026 alone, up 75% YoY. The Vera Rubin platform, announced at GTC 2026, promises 3-4x improvement in AI compute density over Blackwell.

headline: AMD Secures $60B Multi-Year GPU Deal with Meta Platforms
summary: AMD locked down a deal for up to 6 gigawatts of custom AMD Instinct MI450 GPUs from Meta, worth an estimated $60B. The warrant structure hands Meta roughly 10% of AMD equity if both sides deliver. AMD surged 14% to $349.54 following a DA Davidson upgrade.

headline: Hyperscaler CapEx Approaches $700B for 2026, Free Cash Flow Under Pressure
summary: Combined capex for the big five hyperscalers (Amazon, Alphabet, Microsoft, Meta, Oracle) is forecast to exceed $630B in 2026, up 36% from 2025. Amazon projects $200B, Alphabet $175-185B, Meta $115-135B, Microsoft $120B+. Morgan Stanley projects Amazon turning FCF-negative at -$17B.

headline: TSMC Delays ASML High-NA EUV Adoption Through 2029 to Cut Costs
summary: TSMC will hold off deploying ASML's most cutting-edge High-NA EUV lithography machines through 2029, citing costs of €350M+ per unit. TSMC showed its A13 node can achieve smaller, faster chips without the new machines. ASML stock dropped ~10% on the news despite raising its overall 2026 outlook.

headline: TSMC Reports Record Q1 Profits, Up 58% Year-over-Year
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor reported a 58% increase in Q1 2026 profits, beating estimates and marking the fourth consecutive quarter of record profits. AI chip demand continues to drive the world's largest contract chip manufacturer.

headline: Nuclear SMR Stocks Rally on DOE Loan Support and White House Space Nuclear Mandate
summary: NuScale Power (SMR) surged ~16% to $11.90 after securing a DOE-backed SMR project contract. Oklo (OKLO) jumped over 50% in April from $48 to $74.68 on AI-power hype and Meta partnerships. The DOE told Congress the first 5-10 new reactors will almost certainly receive federal loans.

headline: Vertiv Delivers Blockbuster Q1 2026 Beat, Raises Full-Year Guidance
summary: Vertiv reported Q1 net sales of $2.65B (up 30% YoY) with adjusted operating margin of 20.8%. Full-year 2026 guidance raised to $13.25-13.75B in sales with 22-23% adjusted operating margin. Stock trading around $322.

headline: GE Vernova Beats Revenue Estimates, Stock Surpasses $1,000
summary: GE Vernova reported Q1 revenue of $9.34B vs $9.25B estimates, with over $2B in datacenter electrification orders signed in 2025 (3x prior year). Stock closed at $1,002.75, up ~200% in a year. Gas turbines remain critical for bridging datacenter power gaps.

headline: OpenAI Misses Revenue Targets, Revamps Microsoft Partnership
summary: OpenAI CFO reportedly at odds with Sam Altman over missed revenue targets despite $24B annualized run rate. OpenAI and Microsoft revamped their partnership to cap revenue share payments and allow multi-cloud serving. Anthropic reportedly passed OpenAI in revenue at $30B ARR.

headline: Q1 2026 Venture Funding Shatters Records at $300B, AI Dominates
summary: Global venture investment hit $300B in Q1 2026 across 6,000 startups, up 150%+ QoQ and YoY. OpenAI ($122B), Anthropic ($30B), xAI ($20B), and Waymo ($16B) accounted for 65% of all funding. In April alone, 764 of 1,314 deals involved AI companies.

headline: CoreWeave CEO Sells $35.8M in Stock as GPU Cloud Rally Raises Questions
summary: CoreWeave (CRWV) CEO sold $35.8M in stock under a pre-set plan as shares traded around $111. The company recently signed a $21B deal with Meta and secured $6B from Jane Street. Market cap at ~$58B with $66B AI backlog, but insider selling raises sentiment concerns.

headline: Constellation Energy Shares Pull Back 30% from Peak as AI-Utility Hype Cools
summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) trading around $318, down from October peak of $413. Following the $16.4B Calpine acquisition, CEG's portfolio now includes gas and geothermal assets. Analysts maintain Buy consensus but tone has shifted from "euphoric" to "rational" on AI-power trade.

headline: Eaton Datacenter Backlog Equals 11 Years of Construction, Orders Up 200%
summary: Eaton's datacenter orders accelerated 200% in Q4 2025, with the total backlog equaling 11 years of 2025-level construction activity. Every megawatt hyperscalers add translates into electrical distribution equipment orders. Stock trading around $406.

headline: Broadcom AI Chip Revenue Doubles to $8.4B in Q1 FY2026
summary: Broadcom (AVGO) reported Q1 FY2026 AI chip revenue of $8.4B, up 106% year-over-year. The company continues to benefit from custom ASIC AI accelerator demand from hyperscalers alongside its networking portfolio. Stock trading around $402.
